problem.title: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock Ii

approaches.title: Greedy Iterative Profit Accumulation
approaches.summary: Iterate through price windows, summing positive daily differences to compute total profit.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Initial implementation using explicit loop and mutable accumulator.

approaches.title: Greedy Functional One-Liner
approaches.summary: Use Rust iterators to map price windows to positive differences and sum them in a single expression.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Refactored to a concise iterator-based solution replacing explicit loop.
